resolution: All review findings addressed and verified (orchestrator, third party to the comfort implementation; original findings from fresh review agents). CONTESTED split-weekend bug FIXED: upcomingWeekend now pairs a Saturday only with its consecutive (date+1) Sunday — proven by a new test-first weekend.test.ts case and an orchestrator spot-check (Sunday-start window -> available:one, not a split average; adjacent Sat+Sun -> both). MINOR: dead comfort.value {value} key removed from both locales (grep 0); design.md D4 lists the shipped red corpus and explains the excluded negation forms; stale tasks.md BLOCKED note replaced with the RESOLVED fixture note. Battery green: lint, typecheck, 150 tests, build, openspec, traceability.
